summary: February was a foundation-building month. We delivered a suite of brand assets — corporate and Greek Life one-pagers, email templates, and new email signatures — that give Mandy polished sales tools for outreach. LinkedIn engagement stayed strong at 6.2% across 3 posts, well above the platform average. Website traffic held steady at 96 active users with direct traffic making up the majority. We also researched project management tools (recommending Asana) and luggage tag vendors. Next month we're shifting focus to blog content and getting the Costa Rica pages live.

metrics.label: Website Sessions
metrics.note: Baseline month. Direct traffic accounts for ~79% of visits.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Followers
metrics.note: Now tracking followers instead of connections — more meaningful metric.

metrics.label: LinkedIn Impressions
metrics.note: Across 3 posts this month. Strong reach for a small audience.

metrics.label: Engagement Rate
metrics.note: Well above the LinkedIn average of 2–3%.

findings.title: LinkedIn Engagement Rate Is Strong Out of the Gate
findings.description: 68 engagements on 1,104 impressions gives a 6.2% engagement rate — more than double the LinkedIn average of 2–3%. The audience is small but highly engaged. Quality over quantity at this stage.

findings.title: Direct Traffic Dominates Website Visits
findings.description: 76 of 96 active users (79%) came from direct traffic — people typing in the URL or using bookmarks. Organic search brought in just 9 users. Blog content and SEO will be key to diversifying traffic sources.

findings.title: Follower Tracking Gives a Clearer Growth Picture
findings.description: Switching from connections to followers as our LinkedIn metric gives a more accurate view of audience growth. Followers are people actively choosing to see Miles & Memories content in their feed.

actions.title: Corporate Travel One-Pager
actions.description: Designed and delivered a corporate travel services one-pager for sales outreach.

actions.title: Greek Life One-Pager
actions.description: Designed and delivered a Greek Life travel services one-pager.

actions.title: Greek Life Referral One-Pager
actions.description: Designed and delivered a referral program one-pager for Greek Life clients.

actions.title: Email Signatures & Templates
actions.description: Created 2 new email templates and matching email signatures.

actions.title: Luggage Tag Vendor Research
actions.description: Researched vendors and options — ready to design and send for print whenever Mandy wants to pull the trigger.

actions.title: Project Management Tool Research
actions.description: Evaluated options and recommending Asana for task tracking and collaboration.

actions.title: Google Business Profile Verification
actions.description: Still waiting on Google to verify the business profile.

nextSteps: Celebrity Cruise LinkedIn post going out soon.
Marketing meeting on March 4th — syncing up and mapping out next steps.
Start building out blog content to drive organic search traffic.
FAQ page for Greek Life clients — on the back burner, will revisit when timing is right.
NABTU pitch deck — on the back burner.
